rules: Headings MUST use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter).
Overlines/Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, or Lato for headings.

layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: High Density Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout_and_spacing.map_view: Full bleed with floating 'Crystal Glass' panels for navigation controls and chat.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding inside containers. Cards must have p-6 or p-8.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense content. Never center-everything.

surface_strategies.headers: Crystal Glass (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10). No pure transparency.
surface_strategies.cards: Flat background (bg-[#111111]), 1px subtle border (border-white/10), no heavy shadows. Hover: slight lift and border glow.
surface_strategies.ai_chat_panel: Grid Borders approach or Retro-Futurism 'Terminal' look with subtle neon accents.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped or sharp with crisp edges. Interactive elements MUST explicitly set text color on hover. High contrast focus states.
components.forms: Shadcn components heavily customized to match the dark theme.
components.map: Mapbox GL JS or React Map GL with dark mode styling and 3D buildings if possible. Use pulsing dots for real-time location.

rules: Hover states for all interactive elements.
Staggered entrance animations for lists (timetable, friends).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Use APCA guidelines.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (kebab-case, role-based).

media_and_assets.icons: lucide-react (default) or @phosphor-icons/react for duotone technical look.

images.description: Students studying in a modern environment.

3d_and_creative_libraries.recommendation: React Map GL for immersive, dark-mode 3D city/campus maps. Avoid default Google Maps styling. Set background to transparent where needed to blend with UI.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a forced Dark Theme UI. Do NOT use typical purple/teal gradients. Stick to deep blacks, whites, and Volt Blue/Cyber Yellow accents.
Implement the Dashboard using a Bento Grid approach (grid-cols-4).
For the Map page, use a full-viewport layout with a floating Glassmorphism sidebar for routing and AI chat.
Do NOT apply 'transition: all' anywhere. Apply transitions to specific properties (transform, opacity, colors).
Do NOT center align the main app container. Left-align the majority of the content.
Ensure all buttons, inputs, and clickable items have a 'data-testid' attribute.
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (auto-sync success, smart reminders).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports. Pages MUST use default exports.
GENERAL_UI_UX_DESIGN_GUIDELINES: Design for context: The primary goal is fast navigation and schedule lookup. Emphasize clarity and speed.
Use negative space (empty areas) to guide the user's eye to important actions (e.g., 'Navigate to Class' button).
Zoom in on data: Instead of showing a massive timetable, highlight 'Next Class in 15 mins' with a prominent route button.
Contrast is key: Ensure map paths pop against a dark base map (e.g., bright Volt Blue path on a dark grey map).
